name: Mega Uranium Ltd.
description: Mega Uranium Ltd. is a Canada-based diversified uranium mining and investment company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of uranium assets. The company maintains a portfolio of interests in various uranium properties and projects, aiming to increase the value of its holdings through a long-term strategic perspective on the global uranium cycle. Headquartered in Toronto, Mega Uranium operates as a mineral exploration and development entity, actively managing its investment portfolio to capitalize on opportunities within the uranium sector while exploring prospective properties primarily located in Canada and Australia.
